data.name: 魅魔少女
data.detailed_description:
「那永久的存在不會死去，而在怪異的永恆中連死亡也會死去。」
——阿卜杜·阿爾-亞斯拉德，730年

◆故事


聽聞有間收容未知生物的機構，隱藏在這個世界的角落——
玩家將扮演擁有大好前途的研究員里歐，進入了國內知名的機構就職，在到職的第一天便被美艷的主管安排了一個神祕的工作。
一無所知地在那充滿植物芬芳的溫室中，邂逅了一名天真浪漫的魅魔少女——加婭。
【居然每隔一段時間一定要攝取精液？！對少女上下其手她還特別開心？！
偶爾還會有逆推、COSPLAY和和綑綁遊戲——】

在日復一日的相處之中——除了日漸升溫的感情和甜蜜的激情之外
似乎還有著什麼埋藏在無盡黑暗的過往……
在夢境裏反覆地示現的畫面——那究竟代表什麼意思！？

身為里歐的你，能夠接受真相嗎？

◆玩法


充滿探索解謎要素的養成遊戲。
玩家將扮演研究員，里歐，照料著魅魔少女。
可以試著和天真無邪的少女培養感情，用滿滿的愛❤意餵養她。
又或者去解開設施裏頭種種的未解之謎……
一定要記住，這世上許多的真相——往往都有著殘忍而心痛的美麗。


◆遊戲特色


◆34張基本CG，包含差分350張以上，4組動態CG
◆遊戲文字10萬字
◆一位主要女角，四位次要女角
◆SCP基金會題材、克蘇魯風格遊戲
◆含群交、觸手、獵奇表現
◆遊戲結局：含真實結局，共14種

data.short_description: 研究員里歐在到職第一天便被告知需要照料某種神祕生物，而那生物竟是一名需要以精液為食糧的純真少女……少女的秘密似乎不只如此，然而誰也不願透露那足以令人發狂的真相——
data.supported_languages:
繁體中文, 英文, 泰文, 簡體中文, 韓文, 德文, 日文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: WIN10/XP
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 512 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: WIN10/XP
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

data.name: Succubus Girl
data.detailed_description:
"That perpetual being does not die, but in the weird eternity, even death dies."
-- Abdul Alhazred, 730

◆Story


There was an organisation that harboured unknown creatures hidden away in the corner of the world.
Leo, a promising researcher, joined the renowned Abel Biotechnology Company and was offered a well-paid job by his beautiful yet cold supervisor on his first day.
Unable to resist the temptation of money, Leo met a naive and romantic girl named Gaia in a greenhouse-like laboratory filled with the fragrance of plants.
[She had to take semen every once in a while?! And she was particularly happy about being touched up?! Occasionally, there were also domineering, cosplay and bondage games.]

In the midst of all this day-to-day company—apart from the growing affection and sweet passion—there seemed to be something else buried in the endless darkness of the past…
The vision that repeatedly appeared in dreams—what could it mean?!
As Leo, could you accept the truth?

◆Gameplay Instructions


A simulation game full of exploration and puzzle elements.
The player takes on the role of Leo, a researcher who takes care of the succubus girl in the institute.
You can try to develop a relationship with the innocent girl and feed her with plenty of love ❤.
Or try to solve the mysteries of the facility...
Remember, there are many truths in this world--and they are often cruel and heartbreakingly beautiful.


◆Game Features


◆34 basic CGs, including more than 350 differentials and 4 motion CGs
◆Game text: 100,000
◆One main female character and four secondary female characters
◆SCP Foundation theme, Cthulhu-style game
◆Group sex, tentacles, and gory contents included
◆Game endings: 14 types (including a true ending)

data.short_description: Researcher Leo was told on his first day at the institute that he needed to look after some mysterious creature—an innocent girl who fed on semen... There seemed to be more to the girl's secret than that, but no one wanted to reveal the maddening truth.
data.supported_languages:
Traditional Chinese, English, Thai, Simplified Chinese, Korean, German, Japanese*
*languages with full audio support

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: WIN10/XP
  • Processor: 1.2 GHz
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 512 MB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: WIN10/XP
  • Processor: 1.2 GHz
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
